note: One-off import enrichment — temporal arc data that cannot be reconstructed from re-interpretation.

maxims.content: It is only from deriving zero internal motivation from external praise that I can derive zero dismotivation from criticism.
If you are the leader use delegation to bolster the team knowledge, trust, and experience, and free up attention to all levels. Progress will happen whether you do or not.
Nothing is ever locked in, it is all a starting point to relate to when applying it to suit that instant.
Blame is a way of explaining things that require more consideration and effort to properly determine root cause.
Significance can only be derived from truth or false, which can each be perceived as good or bad, but significance derived from truth contributes to reality.
Success is the effort trying sincerely, with integrity — didn't avoid effort from fear or laziness.
The inner goal is the right amount of each virtue at any time, by aiming for the right amount at any moment while heading toward longer goal 'right' amounts.
There is no good or bad in nature, just true or false — everything else is just my or their perspective of things which cannot be trusted.
Curiosity demands patience. Curiosity demands being open to ideas. Curiosity is learning which removes the time-wasting aspect.

emotional_anchors.label: The lazy Sunday market outing
emotional_anchors.content: The family explored a culture not seen for years, experiencing the sound and sights and tastes of the market. Now home, cosy from the rain outside, the glare making me sleepy like the cat.
emotional_anchors.mentor_use: Reference when discussing present-moment awareness and family gratitude

emotional_anchors.label: Betrayal by drug-addicted friend
emotional_anchors.content: Felt heartbroken and worthless when sold out for a few thousand dollars. Ruined reputation with friend group. Later realised: addictions override decency, it was not personal.
emotional_anchors.mentor_use: Reference when trust issues or feelings of worthlessness resurface. Reminder of the rational response achieved.

emotional_anchors.label: Shouting at the kids → encouragement breakthrough
emotional_anchors.content: Shouting expressed disgust, disappointment, dismissed them as worthless. They will always remember how I made them feel. Later: coaxed kids through similar tasks with encouragement. Good result.
emotional_anchors.mentor_use: Proof of capacity to change. Reference both the pain and the triumph when parenting frustration arises.

emotional_anchors.label: Morning journalling outside with the cat
emotional_anchors.content: Morning journalling outside is reflecting on myself, the day, nature, mindful of the needs of the cat.
emotional_anchors.mentor_use: Ground the practitioner in their established practice. Sensory anchor for returning to calm.

emotional_anchors.label: Kangaroo with Joey during mosquito resilience lesson
emotional_anchors.content: Grateful for today's lesson in resilience (mosquitos) to be remodelled with a visitor (kangaroo with Joey).
emotional_anchors.mentor_use: Reference when discussing how fate delivers both challenge and beauty in the same moment.

emotional_anchors.label: Losing the earbud charger
emotional_anchors.content: Lost my earbud charger and overreacted. Trivial event that revealed how accumulated circumstances can still trigger disproportionate reactions.
emotional_anchors.mentor_use: Humorous reference point when the practitioner overreacts to minor setbacks — 'remember the earbud charger?'

emotional_anchors.label: Returning someone else's trolley
emotional_anchors.content: Returned a trolley that wasn't mine. It felt like the actions of a hive mind and that it could become instinctive.
emotional_anchors.mentor_use: Evidence that duty can become instinctive — virtue moving from deliberate to dispositional.

growth_evidence.label: From doom scrolling to intentional learning

early.content: Doom scrolling and youtube financial meltdown videos do not lead to tangible actions to prepare for future events.

late.content: Use AI/Grok/Wikipedia to summarise. Be in the moment with full attention of all senses. Be responsive where it is in service to the moment.

growth_evidence.significance: Shifted from passive anxiety consumption to active, intentional knowledge seeking.

growth_evidence.label: From shouting at kids to encouragement

early.content: Shouting at the kids when they refused to co-operate. Shouting expressed my disgust at their behaviour. It led to a follow-up apology but they will always remember how I made them feel.

late.content: Recently I coaxed the kids through similar tasks requiring co-operation and responded to a tantrum behaviour with encouragement which got the job done. Good result.

growth_evidence.significance: Concrete behavioural change in the most emotionally charged context (parenting). Demonstrates capacity for dispositional shift.

growth_evidence.label: From creative despair to internal motivation

early.content: Dwelling on the lack of impact my art has had, song, screenplay etc. Not having innovated anything meaningful.

late.content: Both are a fantasy motivation and has been an outlet for creative or ingenuity callings that I realised need to be motivated for my own benefit not for the fantasy. Appreciation from others will neither motivate nor discourage me.

growth_evidence.significance: Re-sourced creative motivation from external validation to internal virtue. A fundamental value reclassification.

growth_evidence.label: From avoidance to reaching out

early.content: Avoid calling relatives in case they are cross with me (missed connection, support).

late.content: I practiced patience, resilience, restraint, took pause to appreciate. Reached out to see how I can be of help. Checked in with old friends/family. Show appreciation not just feel it.

growth_evidence.significance: Moved from social avoidance driven by fear of rejection to active reaching out. Courage developed.

growth_evidence.label: From shame to fulfilment

early.content: Opinion of myself to overcome: Delusional, fraud, lazy, incompetent, frail.

late.content: Don't feel the same shame. Outlook is more positive as I have found a fulfilment and patience. Outlook is can-do.

growth_evidence.significance: Measurable reduction in self-directed shame. Replaced by fulfilment and patience. The most significant mood-level change across the journal.

unfinished_threads.label: The cousin situation
unfinished_threads.content: Wasn't there for cousin during a time of crisis. Feels failure for not reaching out despite having nothing to offer. 'I now have to control my passion at being offended by her dismissing of me.'
unfinished_threads.mentor_return_when: When the practitioner discusses family obligations, guilt about not being there, or fear of entering awkward situations.

unfinished_threads.label: Creative expression — music, art, screenplay
unfinished_threads.content: Acknowledged as internally motivated now but no concrete steps taken. Music production, songwriting, filmmaking referenced but never actioned during journal period.
unfinished_threads.mentor_return_when: When the practitioner has energy and is looking for meaningful challenge. The internal motivation is ready; the first step is missing.

unfinished_threads.label: Community service beyond work
unfinished_threads.content: 'Still searching for a meaningful (and not self-beneficial) contribution that I can make from the skills I have.' Seven Hills reserve mentioned. Volunteering belongings as a start.
unfinished_threads.mentor_return_when: When discussing oikeiosis extension or when the practitioner expresses restlessness about making a difference.

unfinished_threads.label: The 'list of put off things'
unfinished_threads.content: Referenced repeatedly across sections — 'work through list of put off things', 'doing my put off things will grant freedom physically and mentally'. Never detailed or started systematically.
unfinished_threads.mentor_return_when: When the practitioner feels burdened or overwhelmed. The list represents both the obstacle and the opportunity.

unfinished_threads.label: Stoicism and wife's shared value system
unfinished_threads.content: Wife and self celebrate wealth and status achievements. 'Biggest challenge is to wealth indifference.' How does Stoic practice coexist with a shared household value system that celebrates preferred indifferents?
unfinished_threads.mentor_return_when: When discussing money decisions, status purchases, or tension between personal development and marriage harmony.
